zh.Sterborough Castle, Lingfield, Surrey, E: 英國素瑞斯特爾波洛 卡素
zh.Sterborough Castle, Surrey, England: 英國素瑞斯特爾波洛 卡素
zh.Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobham於1300年出生在英國素瑞斯特爾波洛 卡素時，他的父親William de Warenne44歲，母親Joan de Vere46歲。他於1344年與Joane de Berkeley在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1361年10月5日在他的家鄉享年61歲，埋葬在英國素瑞令費爾德。

zh-hans.Sterborough Castle, Lingfield, Surrey, E: 英国素瑞斯特爾波洛 卡素
zh-hans.Sterborough Castle, Surrey, England: 英国素瑞斯特爾波洛 卡素
zh-hans.Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England: 英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobham于1300年出生在英国素瑞斯特爾波洛 卡素时，他的父亲William de Warenne44岁，母亲Joan de Vere46岁。他于1344年与Joane de Berkeley在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1361年10月5日在他的家乡享年61岁，埋葬在英国素瑞令費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Cobham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of at least three places in southern England called Cobham, in Kent, Surrey, and Sussex.

nameMeanings.name: Reginald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin, derived from Reginaldus, a Latinized form of Reynold influenced by Latin regina ‘queen’. The full form is now regarded as very formal, and bearers generally shorten it to Reg in ordinary usage.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobham was born in 1300, in Sterborough Castle, Surrey, England, his father, William de Warenne, was 44 and his mother, Joan de Vere, was 46. He married Joane de Berkeley in 1344, in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 5 October 1361, in his hometown, at the age of 61, and was buried in Lingfield, Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobham est né en 1300, à Sterborough Castle, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, William de Warenne, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Joan de Vere, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Joane de Berkeley en 1344, à Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 5 octobre 1361, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Lingfield, Surrey, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobham 1300 in Sterborough Castle, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Warenne 44 und seine Mutter Joan de Vere 46. Er hat 1344 in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Joane de Berkeley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 5. Oktober 1361 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Lingfield, Surrey, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobham è nato il nel 1300 nel Sterborough Castle, Surrey, England, il suo padre, William de Warenne, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Vere, aveva 46 anni. Lui sposato Joane de Berkeley nel 1344, nel Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 5 ottobre 1361, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Lingfield, Surrey, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobhamが1300年にイギリススリーステルボロウ カストルで生まれた時，父William de Warenneは44歳，母Joan de Vereは46歳であった。1344年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアグロウセスターでJoane de Berkeleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1361年10月5日に故郷で61歳で死去し，イギリススリーリングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobham(이)가 1300년 영국 수리 스터버루 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Warenne(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Vere(은)는 46세였다. 그는 1344년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 그루스스터에서 Joane de Berkeley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1361년 10월 5일 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수리 링필드에 묻혔다.

mn.Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England: Gloucester, Glevum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobham nasceu em 1300, em Sterborough Castle, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Warenne, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Vere, tinha 46 anos. Ele casou-se com Joane de Berkeley em 1344, em Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 5 de outubro de 1361, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Lingfield, Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobham родился в 1300 г. в местности стирбороую кастл, сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Warenne было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Vere, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Joane de Berkeley в 1344 г. в местности глоусестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 5 октября 1361 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности лингфиелд, сурри, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobham nació en 1300, en Sterborough Castle, Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Warenne, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Joan de Vere, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Joane de Berkeley en 1344, en Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 5 de octubre de 1361, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Lingfield, Surrey, Inglaterra.
